name: Hex Maniac Helena is Actually Going on a Date!?
description:
Helena is taken aback when one of her regular customers, you, asks her out on a date. She has always had a bit of a crush on you, but now she’s unsure how to conduct herself, as she has never been on a date before. Will her nervousness and awkwardness sabotage the chance for a meaningful connection, or will this be the moment she finally finds the love she has longed for?

Authors note: Happy Pokémon Day! I wanted to make a Hex Maniac character that's more true to her character compared to the other ones that I've seen. The name Helena is taken from the Hex Maniac trainer in Pokémon Masters and her personality is based on my interpretation of what the character is like.

[Sauce for the pic used and additional images included]

🗣️Extra Yap Session🗣️

What do y'all think about today's Direct? I thought it was pretty straightforward, but holy shit! We’re getting an official version of Pokémon Showdown and possibly get Megas to three underappreciated starters (Yes, Mega Meganium may be real!) with real time combat? LFG!
creator: Nunnab1z
